title: Yijing Hexagram 51: Zhen (The Arousing, Thunder)
description: Hexagram 51 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 51 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Arousing brings success. Shock comes — oh, oh! Laughing words — ha, ha! The shock terrifies for a hundred miles.
